roles.description: Manage your organization roles and permissions here.

dialog.title: Add new member
dialog.description: Invite new member to join your organization by email.
dialog.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

members.emptySelection: Select a member to view details

removeDialog.title: Confirm removal
removeDialog.description: Are you sure you want to remove {{username}} from this organization?

removeDialog.title: Removal Confirm
removeDialog.description: Are you sure you want to remove the invitation for {{email}}?

content.endOfList: You have reached the end of the list. No more projects to load.

createDialog.title: Create a new project
createDialog.description: Projects are shared environments where teams can collaborate and share API resources.

name.label: Name
name.description: Human-friendly label for your project, shown in user interfaces.

description.label: Description
description.description: A brief description of your project.

archiveDialog.title: Archive {{projectName}}
archiveDialog.description: By archiving, you will be removing access to all members of this project including yourself. All requests using project's API keys will be rejected. Archived projects cannot be restored.
archiveDialog.confirmInstruction: To confirm, type "{{projectName}}" in the input box

projectName.placeholder: Confirm by typing the project's name

unarchiveDialog.title: Unarchive {{projectName}}
unarchiveDialog.description: By unarchiving, members with access to this project will be able to use the project API keys again. You can archive this project again at any time.
unarchiveDialog.confirmInstruction: To confirm, type "{{projectName}}" in the input box

projectName.placeholder: Confirm by typing the project's name
